description: Contains information about the content log of for a board item.

id.description: Unique identifier of the content log.

contentId.description: Unique identifier of the board where the action happened.

actionType.description: Type of action within the board, such as creation of a widget, update of a comment message, and so on.

actionTime.description:
Date and time when the action happened.
Format: UTC, adheres to [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601), includes a [trailing Z offset](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601#Coordinated_Universal_Time_(UTC)).

actor.description: Contains information about the user who performed the action.

id.description: Unique identifier of the user who performed the action.

email.description: Email of the user who performed the action.

name.description: Name of the user who performed the action.

itemType.description: Type of the board item on which the action happened.

itemId.description: Unique identifier of the board item on which the action happened. For example, the widget ID.

state.description: Object that contains information about the state of the board item after the action was performed.

relationships.description: Contains the list of items related to the current board item.

items.description: Object that contains information about a related board item for the current item.

type.description: Indicates the relationship of this item with the current item. For example, if `type` returns `parent`, this means that related item is a parent for the current item.

itemType.description: Indicates the type of the related board item. For example, if `itemType` returns `widget`, this means that related item is a widget.

itemId.description: Unique identifier of the related board item.
